title: Farlanders
description: a mod I am developing with mcreator that adds "Farlanders" (those glitched white endermen that used to be in minecraft)
body:
A mod that adds the "Farlanders" basically just inverted color endermen, and it adds a new tool and armor set called Urrun Altzairua. Urrun is better than netherite and requires Isolated Dreams in its recipe, which can be obtained by killing regular farlanders or finding a plant called an echo. There are three types of farlanders so far and one enderman varient, The Farlander, The Farlander warrior, The Farlander elite, and The enderman elite. The regular Farlander has green eyes, white skin, and two horns. The Farlander warrior is like the regular Farlander but it has red eyes and four horns. The Farlander elite is like the regular Farlander but its legs, arms, and horns are a dark shade of grey. The Enderman elite is like an elite Farlander but it's skin in black and its legs, arms, and horns are a light grey.

Creature details:

Farlander:
HP:60,
DAMAGE:14,
ARMOR:14

Farlander Warrior:
HP:70,
DAMAGE:14,
ARMOR:20

Farlander Elite:
HP:90,
DAMAGE:18,
ARMOR:24

Enderman Elite:
HP:60,
DAMAGE:12,
ARMOR:12
